titles.title: The Koi Fish in love with the Cat Fairy

data.title: Xiao Li yu Hu Po
title_synonyms: The Koi Fish in love with the Cat Fairy
data.synopsis:
Xiao Li is a carp spirit who has cultivated for a thousand years, and Hu Po is a cat immortal with profound cultivation. Their amusing and adorable daily life as a couple shows how a cat and a fish overcome their species differences to fall in love.

(Source: Douban, translated)
Music video for the song 2005 by dj newtown.
